## Findings
- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] Agent integration guide's MCP tool table missing all 4 entity tools**
  - **Status quo:** `docs/agent-integration.md:88-94` ("Available MCP Tools" table) documents only `memory_get`, `memory_set`, `memory_search`, `memory_list`. It has no row for `entity_list`, `entity_resolve`, `entity_relate`, or `graph_neighbors` — so the new `entity_resolve` tool shipped in this release, and `entity_relate`'s new ID-based/provenance arguments (`from_id`, `to_id`, `source`, `source_ref`, `verification`, `evidence`) added in PR #345, have no reference-table entry at all.
  - **Likely cause:** The table was last updated for the `profile` parameter on `memory_search` (PR #342) but was never extended when `entity_relate`/`graph_neighbors` first shipped, and now `entity_resolve` in this release compounds the same gap.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add table rows for `entity_list`, `entity_resolve`, `entity_relate` (with its full current argument set), and `graph_neighbors`, mirroring the tool descriptions already in `internal/mcp/mcp_tools.go`.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` (or `/03-gh-go` directly, since this is a single well-scoped doc fix) to add the missing MCP tool table rows in `docs/agent-integration.md`.

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `docs/openapi.yaml:8` `version: 0.12.0` → `version: 0.13.0`
- `docs/openapi.yaml:30` `example: 0.12.0` → `example: 0.13.0`
- `docs/agent-integration.md:110` response example `"version":"0.12.0"` → `"version":"0.13.0"`
